recipes.title: Basic stream retry
recipes.promise: A minimal time-travel stream rule: catch one prohibited phrase before release, retry once, and record why.

recipes.title: Stateful redaction ladder
recipes.promise: Rewrite account identifiers, count related secret matches, and escalate future turns only when history makes that necessary.

recipes.title: Done, but where is the file?
recipes.promise: A boring but useful receipt check: alert when a model claims an export is ready without artifact evidence.

recipes.title: Private-route starter
recipes.promise: Keep private-risk requests on local or approved routes while still showing the route decision in receipts.

recipes.title: Tool loop guard
recipes.promise: Watch repeated write-capable tool calls in session history and make the next action reviewable before costs run away.
